description: Archived V1.39 plan per Profile B. Moved from status.json on V1.39 P1 closeout (P1 merged to iteration/v1.39; P2..P4 still in flight on same integration branch).
title: P1 — findings table/API + review executor routing

metadata.description: P1 — findings table/API + review executor routing
metadata.qc: Initial tri-review: qc1+qc2 Approve, qc3 Request Changes (C-1 spec violation: missing (work_id, chapter, status) index per novel-quality-loop.md §2.1). PM fix wave closed C-1. PM-validated merge after green tests.
metadata.qa: skipped — initial QC + PM C-1 fix + green test sweep
shipped: findings table migration 202606090002_findings.sql with severity/status/target_executor TEXT enums + 3 indexes (work_id,status), (creator_id,status), (work_id,chapter,status) — C-1 fix added the 3rd index

Findings DAO at crates/nexus-local-db/src/findings.rs — Finding struct + FindingPatch + create_finding + list_findings (with work_id, severity, status, target_executor filters) + update_finding + get_finding + delete_finding + count_open_findings_by_severity + create_finding_from_review
Compile-time sqlx::query! + query_as! for static DML; runtime query only for DDL (per nexus-local-db/AGENTS.md)
ReviewVerdictFinding struct + create_finding_from_review hook in DAO
Findings API handlers at crates/nexus-daemon-runtime/src/api/handlers/findings.rs — CRUD endpoints + /from-review special endpoint, all creator-scoped
Route registration in works_routes() (per implementer's note to avoid axum 0.7 path-param conflict); from-review registered before {finding_id} for literal-segment priority
CLI creator run status Findings section — open count, severity, top 3 titles, routing hints (→ write | brainstorm | none | master)

7 hermetic tests in tests/findings_api.rs — CRUD + list filter + update/close transition + creator isolation 404 + from-review auto-create + all 4 routing hints + 1 hermetic unit test (test_findings_work_chapter_status_index_exists) for the C-1 index

PM late fix wave: deduped session_captures field in acp_worker/mod.rs (was a merge artifact, removed duplicate struct field + duplicate impl initializer); fixed clippy::option_if_let_else on f_ch.map_or_else
PM C-1 fix: added idx_findings_work_chapter_status index in migration + test asserting the index exists with correct columns
deferred_residuals: R-V139P1-W-1 (medium) — server-side enum validation; defer to V1.40
R-V139P1-W-2 (low) — duplicated ID generation; defer to V1.40
R-V139P1-W-3 (low) — CLI status HTTP timeout; defer to V1.40
R-V139P1-W-4 (low) — list query may skip index; defer to V1.40
R-V139P1-W-5 (low) — runtime sqlx query; defer to V1.40
R-V139P1-W-6 (low) — from-review error not logged; defer to V1.40
